children.name:
AssertionError: New reward was not received by stake address
assert 0 > 0
AssertionError: Not all rewards were transfered

AssertionError: assert 'out of bounds' in 'An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9100 --fee 200000 --out-file /tmp/py...le FILE] 
                                         --out-file FILE
  Build a transaction (low-level, inconvenient)
'
 +  where 'An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9100 --fee 200000 --out-file /tmp/py...le FILE] 
                                         --out-file FILE
  Build a transaction (low-level, inconvenient)
' = str(CLIError('An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9100 --fee 200000 --out-fil...e FILE] 
                                         --out-file FILE
  Build a transaction (low-level, inconvenient)
'))

AssertionError: assert 'option --tx-out: Failed reading' in 'An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9089 --fee 174389 --out-file /tmp/py...e296ddd4a2df6f4275f4bead344247fb7c48bbac5f2b346")) StakeRefNull)) (TxOutAdaOnly AdaOnlyInShelleyEra (Lovelace (-1)))
'
 +  where 'An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9089 --fee 174389 --out-file /tmp/py...e296ddd4a2df6f4275f4bead344247fb7c48bbac5f2b346")) StakeRefNull)) (TxOutAdaOnly AdaOnlyInShelleyEra (Lovelace (-1)))
' = str(CLIError('An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9089 --fee 174389 --out-fil...296ddd4a2df6f4275f4bead344247fb7c48bbac5f2b346")) StakeRefNull)) (TxOutAdaOnly AdaOnlyInShelleyEra (Lovelace (-1)))
'))
 +    where CLIError('An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9089 --fee 174389 --out-fil...296ddd4a2df6f4275f4bead344247fb7c48bbac5f2b346")) StakeRefNull)) (TxOutAdaOnly AdaOnlyInShelleyEra (Lovelace (-1)))
') = <ExceptionInfo CLIError('An error occurred running a CLI command `cardano-cli transaction build-raw --ttl 9089 --fee 1...df6f4275f4bead344247fb7c48bbac5f2b346")) StakeRefNull)) (TxOutAdaOnly AdaOnlyInShelleyEra (Lovelace (-1)))
') tblen=4>.value
